title: Tree Production Innovation Fund: how to make a claim
body: "If you have a Tree Production Innovation Fund (TPIF) agreement in place, use the how to claim guidance to help you submit your report and claim your project expenditure.  The guidance outlines the steps you need to follow, including completing the claim form, report, and gathering the necessary evidence to submit to the Forestry Commission.  The TPIF is now closed for new applications. Find out more about our other grants for trees and woodland. "
